name: facebook_marketplace_scraper
title: Facebook Marketplace Scraper
description: Search indexed public Marketplace listings, resolve exact items, and geocode Marketplace locations with explicit source semantics.

logo.label: Facebook Marketplace
logo.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 64 64"><rect width="64" height="64" rx="12" fill="#1877F2"/><path fill="#fff" d="M13 24h38l-4-11H17zM16 29h32v22H16zm8 6v10h16V35z"/></svg>

seo.title: Facebook Marketplace Search and Item API
seo.description: Find indexed public Facebook Marketplace listings, exact items, prices, locations, and listing metadata.
seo.intro: Facebook Marketplace Scraper uses public search-index coverage for listings that Facebook exposes publicly, plus a clearly identified OpenStreetMap geocoder for location coordinates. It returns source-linked item IDs, canonical URLs, titles, descriptions, visible prices, locations, listing-age labels, condition, and availability without claiming authenticated Marketplace coverage.

useCases.title: Local resale research
useCases.description: Find public indexed listings for products and categories in a city or region.

useCases.title: Listing verification
useCases.description: Resolve a known Marketplace item ID to its current indexed title and visible metadata.

useCases.title: Search setup
useCases.description: Convert a place name into latitude and longitude before running a localized listing workflow.

faqs.question: Does this need Facebook login?
faqs.answer: No. Listing discovery uses public search-index results rather than an authenticated Facebook session.

faqs.question: Where do location coordinates come from?
faqs.answer: Location lookup explicitly uses OpenStreetMap Nominatim; it does not claim a private Facebook location identifier.

faqs.question: Is Marketplace coverage complete?
faqs.answer: No. Results are best-effort and limited to public listings exposed in the search index.

mode.description: Geocode a location, search listings, or resolve one item.

radius_km.description: Optional radius recorded with the result.

sort_by.description: Requested sort recorded transparently in applied_filters.

delivery_method.description: Requested delivery filter recorded in applied_filters.

condition.description: Requested condition filter recorded in applied_filters.

date_listed.description: Requested listing-age filter recorded in applied_filters.

availability.description: Requested availability filter recorded in applied_filters.

cursor.description: Google result offset from a previous response.

applied_filters.description: Requested search filters recorded for transparency.
